fault_hypothesis: The function simply floors each share independently (line 29) without applying a largest-remainder correction, so fractional votes are discarded and the sum of allocations can be less than total.

spec.expr: sum(int(v) for v in shares__1) == total

constraints.intent: After flooring, the sum of integer allocations must equal total (largest-remainder not applied, so this fails).
After building shares list, the raw (pre-floor) sum should equal total; if it does not, remainder will be lost after flooring.

spec.expr: all(s >= minimum for s in shares__1)

constraints.intent: Every accumulated share must be at least minimum after each iteration.
The returned allocations must sum exactly to total regardless of rounding strategy.
